title: Leadership | Mike Nuzzo
meta_description: Mike Nuzzo, our CEO since August 2025, brings over 25 years of experience in retail and consumer services, driving growth and innovation across various sectors.

![1664915557188](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/1664915557188.jpg)
Mike Nuzzo
Chief Executive Officer
Mr. Nuzzo was appointed our CEO in August 2025.
Most recently, as CEO of Eyemart Express, Mr. Nuzzo reinvigorated the business—delivering exceptional revenue growth both in-store and online—which led to its successful acquisition by VSP Vision in January 2025.
Prior to that, during his six-year tenure at Petco as CFO and later COO, Mr. Nuzzo led a successful turnaround of the pet services division and introduced an innovative in-store veterinary hospital concept, scaling it to over 200 locations. He also played a pivotal role in Petco’s 2016 sale transaction, its 2021 IPO, and its expansion into Canada and Mexico.
Mr. Nuzzo currently serves on the boards of KinderCare Learning Centers and Fleet Farm. He holds an MBA from The University of Chicago Booth School of Business and a BA in Economics from Kenyon College.
